workbench.description: AI Dev Workbench — RAG ingest/query/status/reindex tools

supabase.description: Supabase MCP — direct database operations, SQL queries, table management
supabase.notes: Only needed for direct DB access. The workbench bridge handles normal RAG operations.

filesystem.description: Filesystem MCP — read/write files in the workspace
filesystem.notes: Claude Code has built-in file access; enable this for structured file operations.
